summary: Implemented TASK-109: Published benchmark results in docs with methodology. Created scripts/generate-benchmark-docs.ts to generate VitePress-compatible docs from JSONL benchmark data. Generated docs/guide/benchmarks.md with comprehensive results tables (37 benchmarks across 6 categories), methodology documentation (measurement approach, performance budgets, regression detection, environment), cross-framework comparison section, and running instructions. Added Benchmarks page to VitePress sidebar. Wrote 44 passing tests covering categorization, grouping, markdown generation, and integration.
